query: Find 10 parcels in Drammen municipality larger than 5000 m² that intersect 200-year flood zones, sorted by distance to the nearest quick-clay hazard zone ascending.

1.description: Get Drammen municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: Get all parcels in Drammen area (spatial filter)

4.description: Get 200-year flood zones in Drammen area

7.description: Calculate distance to nearest quick-clay hazard zone

executions.sql:
SELECT 
  kommunenummer,
  ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson,
  kommunenavn
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune 
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Drammen'

SELECT 
  teigid,
  matrikkelnummertekst,
  ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson,
  lagretberegnetareal,
  kommunenummer,
  kommunenavn
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '3301'
